# clearpass_network_device (Resource)

Manages a network device (NAD) in ClearPass Policy Manager. Network devices represent switches, wireless controllers, VPN gateways, and other network equipment that communicate with ClearPass via RADIUS, TACACS+, or other protocols.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip_address` (String) IP or Subnet Address of the network device.
- `name` (String) Name of the network device. Must be unique.

### Optional

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `attributes` (Map of String) Additional attributes (key/value pairs) stored with the network device.
- `cli_config` (Attributes) CLI Configuration details of the network device. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cli_config))
- `coa_capable` (Boolean) Flag indicating if the network device is capable of RADIUS Change of Authorization (CoA).
- `coa_port` (Number) CoA port number of the network device.
- `description` (String) Description of the network device.
- `nad_groups` (List of String) List of NAD group names this device belongs to.
- `onconnect_enforcement` (Attributes) OnConnect Enforcement settings. Requires SNMP read configuration and Policy Manager Zone. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--onconnect_enforcement))
- `radius_secret` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) RADIUS Shared Secret of the network device. This value is write-only and will not be read back from the API.
- `radsec_config` (Attributes) RadSec settings of the network device. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--radsec_config))
- `radsec_enabled` (Boolean) Flag indicating if the network device has RadSec enabled.
- `snmp_read` (Attributes) SNMP read settings of the network device. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--snmp_read))
- `snmp_write` (Attributes) SNMP write settings of the network device. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--snmp_write))
- `tacacs_secret` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) TACACS+ Shared Secret of the network device. This value is write-only and will not be read back from the API.
- `vendor_id` (Number) Vendor ID (IANA enterprise number) of the network device.
- `vendor_name` (String) Vendor Name of the network device (e.g., 'Cisco', 'Aruba', 'Juniper').

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Numeric ID of the network device assigned by ClearPass.

<a id="nestedatt--cli_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cli_config`

Optional:

- `command_prompt_regex` (String) Command prompt regex.
- `enable_password` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Enable password. Write-only.
- `enable_prompt_regex` (String) Enable prompt regex.
- `password` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) CLI password. Write-only.
- `password_prompt_regex` (String) Password prompt regex.
- `port` (Number) SSH/Telnet port number.
- `type` (String) Access type of the network device. Valid values: `SSH`, `Telnet`.
- `username` (String) CLI username.
- `username_prompt_regex` (String) Username prompt regex.


<a id="nestedatt--onconnect_enforcement"></a>
### Nested Schema for `onconnect_enforcement`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Flag indicating if OnConnect Enforcement is enabled.
- `ports` (String) Port names in CSV format (e.g. 'FastEthernet 1/0/10'). Empty string enables for all ports.


<a id="nestedatt--radsec_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `radsec_config`

Optional:

- `cn_regex` (String) Common Name Regular Expression String.
- `expiry_date` (String) Issuer CA Certificate Expiry Date.
- `san_regex` (String) Subject Alternate Name Regular Expression String.
- `serial_number` (String) Serial Number of a Certificate.
- `src_override_ip` (String) Source Override IP indicates the actual Source IP Address.
- `subject_dn` (String) Issuer CA Certificate Subject DN.
- `validate_cert` (String) Certificate validation method. Valid values: `NONE`, `CN_OR_SAN`, `RFC`.


<a id="nestedatt--snmp_read"></a>
### Nested Schema for `snmp_read`

Optional:

- `auth_key` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Authentication key. Write-only.
- `auth_protocol` (String) Authentication protocol. Valid values: `MD5`, `SHA`.
- `community_string` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Community string of the network device. Write-only.
- `force_read` (Boolean) This field is deprecated.
- `privacy_key` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Privacy key. Write-only.
- `privacy_protocol` (String) Privacy protocol. Valid values: `DES_CBC`, `AES_128`.
- `read_arp_info` (Boolean) Enable to read ARP table from this device.
- `security_level` (String) Security level of the network device. Valid values: `NOAUTH_NOPRIV`, `AUTH_NOPRIV`, `AUTH_PRIV`.
- `snmp_version` (String) SNMP version of the network device. Valid values: `V1`, `V2C`, `V3`.
- `user` (String) SNMPv3 username.
- `zone_name` (String) Policy Manager Zone name to be associated with the network device.


<a id="nestedatt--snmp_write"></a>
### Nested Schema for `snmp_write`

Optional:

- `auth_key` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Authentication key. Write-only.
- `auth_protocol` (String) Authentication protocol. Valid values: `MD5`, `SHA`.
- `community_string` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Community string. Write-only.
- `default_vlan` (Number) Default VLAN for port when SNMP-enforced session expires.
- `privacy_key` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Privacy key. Write-only.
- `privacy_protocol` (String) Privacy protocol. Valid values: `DES_CBC`, `AES_128`.
- `security_level` (String) Security level. Valid values: `NOAUTH_NOPRIV`, `AUTH_NOPRIV`, `AUTH_PRIV`.
- `snmp_version` (String) SNMP version. Valid values: `V1`, `V2C`, `V3`.
- `user` (String) SNMPv3 username.
